courses.description: Select which subjects you are enrolled in to get better results.
courses.description_creation: Select which subjects you are enrolled in to get better results. You can change your selection in your account settings at any time
courses.title: Edit Courses

delete_account.confirm: I understand that I am permanently deleting my account.
delete_account.title: Delete Account

warn_box.text:
If you delete your account, it will be permanently removed along with all your settings. Your created entries will be retained, but will no longer be linked to your name. Announcements will also be retained. If you want to remove entries or announcements, please delete them manually before closing your account.

You can create a new account at any time, but previously added content will no longer be linked to your account, so you will no longer be able to access it.
warn_box.title: Delete Account permanently?

errors.owner_cannot_leave: The owner cannot leave the group. Transfer ownership or delete the group instead.

security.description: Two-factor authentication provides additional protection for your account. You will need any 2FA app, such as Google Authenticator.
security.title: Security
